# Web cache: Common Core Math Standards grade 1 2 3 4 5 topics counting addition subtraction 

> 时间: 2026-03-07 16:27


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

In Grade 2 , instructional time should focus on four critical areas: (1) extending understanding of base-ten notation; (2) building fluency with addition and subtraction ; (3) using standard units of measure; and (4) describing and analyzing shapes. The Common Core focuses on a clear set of math skills and concepts, teaching them in an organized way throughout the school year and across different grades.
